SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-07-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRST CASH FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACHECO, CARLOS $1,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,810.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
